specification: environmental_only, clinical_only, combined; numeric subsets aligned to modeling blocks.
Environmental numeric uses kept_weather_numeric after global correlation filter (31 features).
Median imputation for missing numeric values, then StandardScaler (centering + scaling).
PCA n_components=min(n_features,20); scree/loadings/scatter exported per block.
n_pcs_70, n_pcs_80, n_pcs_90 computed from cumulative explained variance.
Two PCA spaces: Dfixed6 (6 PCs cap) and D80 (PC count to reach 80% variance; min2 max20).
KMeans k=2..8 with n_init=50, random_state=42; evaluate k_best plus k=4 and k=6.
ARI and NMI vs diagnosis labels for k=4, k=6, k_best.
Ward linkage on PCA scores; dendrogram + contingency at k=4 and k=6.
k=6 refers to clustering cluster-count only (not discretization).
Clinical PCA includes __missing indicators (13 of 27 clinical numeric features in this run).
